summary: Comprehensive testing of Loan Freedom Planner completed. Fixed critical frontend import issue (TrendingUp component) and backend Excel export bug. All core functionality working properly including simulation engine, export features, and navigation.

fixed_bugs.fix_applied: Replaced dynamic column access with static column letters

fixed_bugs.issue: Missing input validation for negative values
TrendingUp icon not imported, causing JavaScript runtime errors

passed_tests: Advanced Loan Simulation with prepayments - massive savings calculation
Input validation for negative loan amounts
Landing page loads with all sections and navigation
EMI Simulator page loads with form elements
Export buttons work (Excel and PDF downloads)
Available Soon pages navigation and email signup
Navigation between Landing and Simulator pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 features working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor enhancement opportunity: The periodic payment form could be more intuitive - currently requires manual configuration but the UI interaction could be streamlined. All core functionality is working excellently.
